name: auth.logout
description: Revoke OAuth tokens and remove them from storage. Optionally revokes tokens with authorization server (requires network connectivity) or clears local storage only.

client_id.description: OAuth client identifier for which to clear tokens. Defaults to guideai-mcp-client.

revoke_remote.description: Whether to revoke tokens with authorization server (RFC 7009) before clearing local storage. Recommended true for security.

tokens_cleared.description: True if tokens were removed from local storage (keychain or file).

access_token_revoked.description: True if access token was successfully revoked with authorization server.

refresh_token_revoked.description: True if refresh token was successfully revoked with authorization server.

token_storage_path.description: Location where tokens were stored (keychain service name or file path).

error.description: Error code if revocation or storage clearing failed.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings (e.g., 'remote revocation failed but tokens cleared locally').
